title: KamoofSMP
description: When you kill someone, they will drop their head and with it you can become the person you killed ! This plugin is the official plugin of the Kamoof SMP !
body:
This plugin is the official plugin of the Kamoof SMP, the concept is that : when you kill someone, they drop their head and with it you can morph into the person you killed ! With this twist, you will never be sure of who is really online ! 

If you die while you're disguised, you will become yourself again !

You can disguise into someone with a right click with the head in your main hand !
To become yourself again, you just need to do /undisguise !

And now you know everything and can have fun ! 

This plugin needs [NickAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/nickapi-1-8-1-20-4.26013/) in version 6.5.3 in order to work
